ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forest_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where data was collected */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Type of tree cover (e.g., Pine, Oak) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data entry (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "ba_ha" REAL /* Basal area per hectare */,
  "tph_a" REAL /* Trees per hectare */,
  "qmd" REAL /* Quadratic mean diameter */,
  "prop_piri" REAL /* Proportion of the tree species */,
  "sdi" REAL /* Stand density index */,
  "sg_m" REAL /* Specific gravity of the tree species */,
  "sdi_99" REAL /* Stand density index at the 99th percentile */,
  "rel_den" REAL /* Relative density of the stand */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forest_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forest_data_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES data_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forest_data_cover_type FOREIGN KEY ("cover_type") REFERENCES cover_types ("cover_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forest_data_data_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the site */,
  "site_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cover_types" (
  "cover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cover type */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Name of the cover type (e.g., PINE, OAK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cover type */,
  "average_height" REAL /* Average height of the tree species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the tree species in years */,
  "ecological_significance" TEXT /* Ecological significance of the tree species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cover_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES forest_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator of the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data" (
  "project_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project-data association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forest data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES forest_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of this version update */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES forest_data ("data_id")
)
